boss.name: Ancient Guardian of the Serpent Temple

enemy.name: Venomous Vine-Stalker
enemy.weakness: Silver Longbow arrows pierce its soft core.

pickup.effect: Provides light and acts as a catalyst for ancient plant life
pickup.name: Firefly Lantern

encounters.trigger: Killing the stalker reveals a glowing path leading to the Hidden Clearing.

enemy.name: Shadow Panther
enemy.weakness: Firefly Lantern light blinds the creature, making it vulnerable to arrows.

pickup.effect: A golden sap that reacts violently to sunlight

encounters.trigger: Defeating the panther clears the brambles blocking the entrance to the Serpent Temple.

enemy.name: Stone Golem Construct
enemy.weakness: Solar Nectar coated arrows melt the construct's stone joints.

pickup.effect: Used to interact with the final boss's altar
pickup.name: Temple Key

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the central door allows access to the inner sanctum where the boss awaits.
